scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:tools
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck:all && npm run test:coverage && npm run build && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:e2e:a11y && npm run simulate all 25 -- --ci
scripts.lint: biome check src scripts e2e vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts esbuild.client.mjs
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write src scripts e2e vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts esbuild.client.mjs
scripts.format: biome format --write src scripts e2e vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts esbuild.client.mjs
